name: Type 4 Anti-Tank Grenade (Japan)
summary: Japanese shaped-charge anti-tank grenade designed for close-range use against Allied armour in the Pacific. Often used in suicide attacks as Japanese forces lacked effective portable anti-tank weapons.

name: Type 93 Long Lance Torpedo
summary: The finest torpedo of the war. Oxygen-fuelled (leaving no bubble trail), it had four times the range of contemporary US torpedoes. Gave Japanese destroyers a decisive night-combat advantage in the Guadalcanal campaign.
